recommendations: All models exceed the High trust threshold (>=0.8). System is reliable for production use.
GBM achieves the best ROC-AUC (0.792) and precision (0.860).
CNN achieves the highest recall/TAR (0.953) — best for minimising missed forgeries.
Autoencoder achieves the lowest FRR (0.060) and highest overall accuracy (0.846).
